hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.safetensors|*.ckpt|*.bin|*.pth|*.gguf) echo 'H1 weights-guard: BLOCK — model weight artifact. Confirm with user before editing.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
hooks.description: H1 weights-guard: block edits to model weight files

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *eval*.jsonl|evals/*.jsonl) if [ -z "$ALLOW_EVAL_EDIT" ]; then echo 'H2 eval-dataset-guard: BLOCK — eval dataset edit needs ALLOW_EVAL_EDIT=1 (prevents training/eval leakage).' >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac
hooks.description: H2 eval-dataset-guard: protect eval datasets from silent edits

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(pip install|npm install|yarn add)' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(requirements\.txt|package-lock|yarn\.lock|pyproject)'; then echo 'H5 vibe-block: unpinned dependency install. Use lockfile or pin version explicitly.' >&2; exit 2; fi
hooks.description: H5 vibe-block: refuse unpinned package installs

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in train/*|data/train/*) python3 -c "import sys,os; eval_dir=os.path.join(os.path.dirname('$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH').split('train')[0],'eval'); sys.exit(0)" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
hooks.description: H7 data-leakage-guard: stub — extend with hash comparison train vs eval

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.ipynb) command -v jupyter >/dev/null && jupyter nbconvert --clear-output --inplace "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
hooks.description: H8 notebook-clean: strip notebook outputs before edit

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *SKILL.md|*prompt*|*.system.md|*/agents/*.md) echo 'H3 prompt-change-reminder: prompt/skill changed. Run /eval-first or /regression-eval to validate.' ;; esac
hooks.description: H3 prompt-change-reminder: remind eval after prompt edits

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *SKILL.md|*prompt*|*.system.md) tokens=$(wc -w < "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); if [ "${tokens:-0}" -gt 1500 ]; then echo "H4 token-budget-warn: $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH has ~$tokens words (>2k tokens estimate). Consider /prompt-compress."; fi;; esac
hooks.description: H4 token-budget-warn: warn on large prompt files

hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in docs/*.md|*wiki*.md) if grep -qiE '(SOTA|state.of.the.art|breakthrough|outperforms)' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -qE '(arxiv|https?://|\[\^[0-9])' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'H6 paper-cite-check: ML claim detected without citation. Add arxiv/source link.'; fi;; esac
hooks.description: H6 paper-cite-check: warn on uncited ML claims
